name: Choucroute Garni
recipeIngredient: 3/4 lb Polish kielbasa, cut into 2-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the pork spareribs between bones into single pieces. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
2. Brown the ribs in oil in a large skillet. Remove the ribs and set aside.
3. Add garlic, bacon, and onion to the skillet and sauté until the onions turn golden, stirring occasionally.
4. Stir in the sauerkraut, carrots, and caraway seeds. Spoon sauerkraut into the bottom of a casserole dish to cover.
5. Arrange half of the ribs over the sauerkraut along with potatoes and kielbasa.
6. Spoon remaining sauerkraut over top of meat and vegetables.
7. Top with the remaining ribs.
8. Pour chicken broth and white wine over the ingredients.
9. Bake at 325°F for 2-3 hours, or until the ribs are tender.
